subcodes.first_line: Last night the shaikh went all about the city, lamp in hand crying, "I am weary of beast and devil, a man is my desire"
subcodes.first_line_orig: دی شیخ با چراغ همی گشت گرد شهر کز دیو دد ملولم و انسانم آرزو است دوست مهربان
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @spiritual transformation, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @evanescence and eternality; fana and baqa, @The Holy Spirit, @poems and quotation from poetry, @mystical themes, @love of God
